title: cyclosorus costularis
intro: Cyclosorus costularis, also known as the Chinese leather fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Blechnaceae, native to China and other parts of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Cyclosorus costularis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or a decoction, and it is also used in herbal remedies to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
